feedback_items.suggested_improvements: 补充 delete-after-write 顺序、延迟双删和降级策略。

messages.content: I delete cache after database writes.

scoring_references.title: Redis cache consistency
scoring_references.excerpt: 在数据库更新后删除缓存，并处理竞争窗口。

answer_references.title: High-score Redis answer
answer_references.excerpt: 建议说明延迟双删或基于 binlog 的失效策略，以缩短脏读窗口。
